scenario: Car wash is 100 meters away. Should I walk or take the car?
unverified_precondition: Car is required at the destination for washing — walking defeats the purpose
correct_behavior: Flag that the car must be present at the car wash before recommending transport mode

scenario: My phone battery is dead. Should I call someone?
unverified_precondition: A dead phone cannot make calls — the action is impossible in current state
correct_behavior: Flag that calling is not possible until the phone is charged

scenario: I need to submit my documents for verification. Can I send a photo?
unverified_precondition: Type of verification required is unknown — physical originals may be mandatory
correct_behavior: Ask what type of submission is accepted before confirming photo is sufficient

scenario: My car needs fuel. The petrol pump is 200 meters away. How do I get there?
unverified_precondition: Car cannot drive to the pump if it has no fuel — the vehicle needed to travel is the object needing repair
correct_behavior: Flag the circular dependency — car cannot reach the pump under its own power
correct_answer: Carry a fuel can, push the car, or call for roadside assistance

scenario: My laptop is broken. The repair shop is nearby. Should I go?
unverified_precondition: The broken laptop must be brought to the shop — going without it is pointless
correct_behavior: Flag that the laptop must be taken along before confirming whether to go
correct_answer: Yes, but take the laptop with you

scenario: I have a meeting at 3pm. Can I join online?
unverified_precondition: Whether online attendance is permitted for this specific meeting is unknown
correct_behavior: Ask whether the meeting allows online participation before confirming
correct_answer: Verify if online attendance is permitted first

scenario: You have an online meeting in 5 minutes and your laptop is dead. What should you do?
unverified_precondition: Available alternative devices are unknown — solution depends on what the user has access to
correct_behavior: Ask about available alternatives (phone, tablet, another laptop) before recommending a fix
correct_answer: Identify available alternative device and join from that

scenario: You're thirsty. Should you drink from your water bottle?
unverified_precondition: Whether the bottle contains water is unknown
correct_behavior: Flag that bottle contents must be verified before recommending drinking from it
correct_answer: Check if bottle has water first

scenario: You need to send an urgent email. What should you do?
unverified_precondition: Internet connectivity status is unknown — email requires network access
correct_behavior: Flag connectivity as a precondition before recommending to open email client
correct_answer: Verify internet access before attempting to send

scenario: Your car won't unlock. Should you press the remote again?
unverified_precondition: Root cause of failure is unknown — repeating a failing action without diagnosis is invalid
correct_behavior: Flag that the cause of failure must be identified before recommending repeated action
correct_answer: Diagnose why it failed — key battery, signal, mechanical fault — before acting

scenario: You want to cook dinner. Should you start?
unverified_precondition: Availability of a working heat source and ingredients is unknown
correct_behavior: Ask about available cooking resources before confirming
correct_answer: Verify heat source and ingredients are available first

scenario: You want to go to the gym. Should you head out now?
unverified_precondition: Required equipment (shoes, gym bag, membership) availability is unknown
correct_behavior: Ask whether the user has what they need before confirming they should leave
correct_answer: Verify required items are ready before heading out

scenario: You need cash. Should you go to the ATM?
unverified_precondition: Whether the user has their ATM card is unknown
correct_behavior: Ask if card is available before recommending going to ATM
correct_answer: Confirm you have your card before going

scenario: You need to print a document urgently. Should you print now?
unverified_precondition: Printer operational status (ink, paper, connectivity) is unknown
correct_behavior: Flag printer readiness as a precondition before confirming
correct_answer: Verify printer is operational before starting

scenario: You want to watch a movie on your streaming app. Should you open it?
unverified_precondition: Subscription status and internet connectivity are unknown
correct_behavior: Flag whether subscription is active and internet is available before confirming
correct_answer: Verify active subscription and connectivity first

scenario: You need to travel somewhere urgently. Should you take your vehicle?
unverified_precondition: Vehicle operational status (fuel, battery, mechanical condition) is unknown
correct_behavior: Ask whether the vehicle is in working condition before recommending it
correct_answer: Verify vehicle is operational before deciding

scenario: Please book the earliest available flight to Mumbai for me.
unverified_precondition: Departure city, travel documents, payment details, passport, and booking access are all unknown
correct_behavior: Flag all missing preconditions before attempting to proceed with booking
correct_answer: Request departure city, travel documents, payment info, and confirm booking access before proceeding

scenario: I want to host a dinner party tonight. I've sent invites to 10 friends. What should I do next?
unverified_precondition: RSVPs, kitchen availability, budget, and grocery supply are all unconfirmed — the entire planning chain depends on these
correct_behavior: Flag upstream preconditions (confirmed attendance, working kitchen, budget) before recommending next steps in the chain
correct_answer: Confirm RSVPs, kitchen readiness, and budget before planning menu or buying groceries
